ddls:
CREATE TABLE "job_postings" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job posting */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Title of the job */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company posting the job */,
  "experience_required" TEXT /* Experience required for the job */,
  "salary_offered" TEXT /* Salary offered for the job */,
  "job_location" INTEGER /* Reference to the job location */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "posted_date" TEXT /* Date the job was posted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the job posting (e.g., active, closed) */,
  "posting_source" TEXT /* Source of the job posting (e.g., company website, job board) */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Deadline for job applications */,
  "job_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job category */,
  "job_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the job type */,
  "number_of_openings" INTEGER /* Number of available positions */,
  "language_requirements" TEXT /* Language requirements for the job */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits offered with the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_location FOREIGN KEY ("job_location") REFERENCES job_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_category_id") REFERENCES job_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_postings_job_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_type_id") REFERENCES job_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_rating" REAL /* Rating of the company (out of 5) */,
  "company_reviews" TEXT /* Number of reviews for the company */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "hr_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the HR contact person */,
  "hr_contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the HR contact person */,
  "company_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the company's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "required_skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting requiring the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  "skill_description" TEXT /* Description of the skill */,
  "skill_level" TEXT /* Level of proficiency required for the skill (e.g., beginner, intermediate, advanced) */,
  "required_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience required for the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_required_skills_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job application */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job applied for */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate applying */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" INTEGER /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, accepted, rejected) */,
  "application_method" TEXT /* Method of application (e.g., online, email, in-person) */,
  "application_status_date" TEXT /* Date the application status was last updated */,
  "interview_scheduled" INTEGER /* Whether an interview has been scheduled */,
  "interview_date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled interview */,
  "interview_location" TEXT /* Location of the interview */,
  "interviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user conducting the interview */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_interviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("interviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_applications_application_status FOREIGN KEY ("application_status") REFERENCES application_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate */,
  "resume_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's resume */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate applied */,
  "current_company" TEXT /* Candidate's current or last company */,
  "current_position" TEXT /* Candidate's current or last position */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Total years of experience */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Highest level of education */,
  "education_institution" TEXT /* Institution where the candidate studied */,
  "cover_letter_file" TEXT /* File path to the candidate's cover letter */,
  "linkedin_profile" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's LinkedIn profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the application status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the application status */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status in the application process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the job location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the job is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the job is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the job is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the job location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the job location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the job category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent job category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the job type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the job type */,
  "part_time_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours for part-time jobs */,
  "full_time_hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours for full-time jobs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR manager, recruiter, department head) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "job_posting_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "job_id" INTEGER /* ID of the job posting being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the job posting */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the job posting was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_access_job_id FOREIGN KEY ("job_id") REFERENCES job_postings ("job_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_job_posting_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
